test_anime.jpg.description: Synthetic cartoon-style stick-figure drawing: round face with blonde hair split into two yellow triangular points, blue eyes, smile, torso shown as white rectangle with red triangle and blue trapezoidal skirt/pants. Pink background. Crude placeholder art, not a real manga cover. The yellow triangles on top could be read as either animal ears or a crown — genuinely ambiguous, so neither is placed in must_have.

test_anime_detailed.jpg.description: Synthetic cartoon-style drawing very similar to test_anime.jpg: round face, blue eyes, rosy cheeks, smile, blonde hair, and two yellow triangular points sitting on top of a horizontal yellow band on the head. The horizontal band strongly suggests a crown (王冠/寶冠) rather than animal ears. Same white-rectangle torso with red triangle and blue skirt/pants, pink background. Still crude placeholder art, not a real manga cover.

test_image.jpg.description: Solid red square. Contains no recognizable subject, characters, objects, or scenes. The correct pipeline output is effectively empty — no tag should confidently apply.

test_real_image.jpg.description: Random RGB noise (static-like pixelated multicolor pattern). Contains no recognizable subject, characters, objects, or scenes. The correct pipeline output is effectively empty — no tag should confidently apply.

new_image_5.jpg.description: Minimalist geometric composition featuring three primary visual elements on a solid red background: a blue rectangle positioned in the center-left area and a white circle positioned toward the right. The image employs a limited color palette of red, blue, and white, creating strong visual contrast through complementary color relationships. The simple geometric shapes (rectangle and circle) are rendered with sharp, clean edges. The composition is highly structured and abstract, with no recognizable subjects or representational elements. The layout demonstrates balanced asymmetry with the background color dominating the visual field.

new_image_6.jpg.description: Regular grid pattern with alternating colors creating a checkered or striped effect. The image shows a systematic, repeating arrangement of colored rectangular sections organized in rows and columns. Multiple bright colors alternate within the grid structure, including reds, blues, greens, yellows, and other vibrant hues. The pattern is perfectly symmetrical and mathematical in nature, with each cell of equal size and proportion. The overall composition is highly structured, ordered, and repetitive, demonstrating classic grid-based design principles. No representational content or recognizable objects are present.

new_image_7.jpg.description: Gradient composition transitioning smoothly from deep blue on the left side to bright green on the right side. The gradient flow is horizontal and continuous, creating a chromatic transition between two cool to cool-warm colors. White text reading 'CHARACTER' is centered on the gradient, rendered in a clean sans-serif font. The text provides strong contrast against the gradient background, making it highly legible. The overall design is modern and minimalist, emphasizing the color transition and typography. The composition is balanced with the text serving as the primary focal point against the flowing gradient background.

new_image_8.jpg.description: Abstract composition featuring randomly distributed colorful rectangular shapes scattered across a solid black background. The rectangles vary in size, color, and position, creating a dynamic and chaotic arrangement. The color palette is diverse and vibrant, including reds, blues, greens, yellows, oranges, purples, and other bright hues. The rectangles are rendered with crisp edges and filled with solid colors, creating strong contrast against the black background. The overall composition is non-representational and purely abstract, emphasizing color interaction and spatial distribution. The randomness and variety create visual interest despite the lack of any identifiable subject matter.

new_image_9.jpg.description: Stylized face-like composition created with simple geometric elements resembling a character or abstract head. The structure includes two oval or circular shapes positioned as eyes, a triangular or pointed shape suggesting a nose in the center, and a horizontal line or curved shape representing a mouth. All elements are outlined with black lines on a light background, creating a minimalist facial representation. The proportions and spacing suggest a simplified face with a slightly whimsical or cartoon quality. The composition is symmetrical along the vertical axis, with the features arranged in a logical face-like configuration. The style is intentionally crude and abstracted rather than realistic.

new_image_10.jpg.description: Vertical stripe pattern composed of ten distinct color bands arranged in a parallel arrangement from left to right. Each vertical stripe is of equal width and contains a solid, pure color. The color sequence represents a full spectrum including red, orange, yellow, green, cyan, blue, purple, and variations of these primary hues. The stripes extend from top to bottom of the image, creating a linear, rhythmic pattern. The transitions between colors are sharp and clean with no gradation or blending. The composition is highly structured, repetitive, and mathematical, emphasizing color variation and visual rhythm through systematic band arrangement.

new_image_11.jpg.description: Diagonal stripe pattern featuring alternating navy blue and white rectangular bands arranged at a consistent diagonal angle. The stripes run from the upper left to lower right, with each stripe maintaining equal width. The navy blue provides deep, saturated color while white offers maximum contrast and brightness. The pattern is perfectly regular and systematic, with clean, sharp lines between each color band. The composition creates a sense of dynamic motion through the diagonal orientation while maintaining strict geometric order. The overall effect is classic, structured, and nautical in aesthetic appeal.

new_image_12.jpg.description: Concentric circles pattern with seven distinct color bands radiating outward from a central point. Each circular band is a solid, different color, creating a target-like or bullseye appearance. The colors include various bright and saturated hues such as red, blue, green, yellow, orange, and purple. The circles are perfectly centered and evenly spaced, creating a balanced, symmetrical composition. The circular geometry creates a sense of radial order and mathematical precision. The pattern has a decorative quality and emphasizes the visual relationship between colors when arranged concentrically. The overall composition is meditative and visually harmonious.

new_image_13.jpg.description: Classic black and white checkerboard pattern composed of alternating squares in a grid formation. Each square is either pure black or pure white, arranged in a standard checkerboard configuration with no gray or intermediate tones. The pattern achieves perfect symmetry both horizontally and vertically, creating an infinitely repeating tessellation. The squares are of uniform size, and the sharp geometric edges between black and white create maximum visual contrast. The composition is mathematically precise and historical in aesthetic, evoking classic gaming boards and optical patterns. The simplicity of the two-color palette emphasizes geometric arrangement and visual rhythm.

new_image_14.jpg.description: Composition featuring randomly distributed colored ellipses and blob-like organic shapes scattered across a dark gray background. The shapes vary significantly in size, color, and position, creating an organic, naturalistic feel despite being abstract. The colors of the ellipses include various bright hues like red, blue, green, yellow, and orange, providing vibrant contrast against the muted dark background. The shapes are soft-edged and rounded, lacking the geometric precision of rectangles or strict angles. The overall arrangement is chaotic and unstructured, emphasizing spontaneity and visual exploration. The composition suggests cellular or liquid-like patterns while remaining purely abstract with no identifiable subject matter.
